["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://www.cpan.org/","rel":"nofollow","children":"CPAN"}]," (The Comprehensive Perl Archive Network) 镜像源的配置文件为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"MyConfig.pm"}],"（一般位于 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.cpan/CPAN/MyConfig.pm"}],"），可使用包管理脚本 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"cpan"}]," 进行修改。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"初次使用","children":"初次使用"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["如果 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"MyConfig.pm"}]," 配置文件不存在，在命令行中执行："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"已有配置","children":"已有配置"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"在-cpan-shell-中手动设置镜像","children":"在 CPAN Shell 中手动设置镜像"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["在命令行中执行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"cpan"}]," 进入 cpan shell："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"console"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"在命令行中使用脚本设置","children":"在命令行中使用脚本设置"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"在命令行中执行："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"pkgsrc","children":"pkgsrc"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["本节供 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../pkgsrc/","children":"pkgsrc 帮助"}],"使用"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# 自动生成 MyConfig.pm");t.b("
" + i);t.b("## 对于 Perl 5.36（或 CPAN 2.29）及以上，使用如下命令");t.b("
" + i);t.b("PERL_MM_USE_DEFAULT=1 perl -MCPAN -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->edit("pushy_https", 0); CPAN::HandleConfig->edit("urllist", "unshift", "");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/"); mkmyconfig'");t.b("
" + i);t.b("## 对于较久版本，使用如下命令");t.b("
" + i);t.b("PERL_MM_USE_DEFAULT=1 perl -MCPAN -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->edit("urllist", "unshift", "");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/"); mkmyconfig'");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 或不使用默认配置，手动确认各个配置选项");t.b("
" + i);t.b("perl -MCPAN -e 'mkmyconfig'");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-1:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("cpan shell -- CPAN exploration and modules installation");t.b("
" + i);t.b("Enter 'h' for help.");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 列出当前的镜像设置");t.b("
" + i);t.b("cpan[1]> o conf urllist");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 将本站镜像加入镜像列表首位");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 注：若已在列表中则可跳过本步直接退出，修改列表不会执行自动去重");t.b("
" + i);t.b("cpan[2]> o conf urllist unshift ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 或将本站镜像加入镜像列表末尾");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 注：本命令和上面的命令执行一个即可，修改列表不会执行自动去重");t.b("
" + i);t.b("cpan[3]> o conf urllist push ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 或清空镜像列表，仅保留本站");t.b("
" + i);t.b("cpan[4]> o conf urllist ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# Perl 5.36 及以上用户需要关闭 pushy_https 以使用镜像站");t.b("
" + i);t.b("cpan[5]> o conf pushy_https 0");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 保存修改后的配置至 MyConfig.pm");t.b("
" + i);t.b("cpan[6]> o conf commit");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 退出 cpan shell");t.b("
" + i);t.b("cpan[7]> quit");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-2:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# 若本站不在镜像列表中则将其加入列表首位");t.b("
" + i);t.b("if ! (");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    perl -MCPAN -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->load();' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("        -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->prettyprint("urllist")' |");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    grep -qF '");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/'");t.b("
" + i);t.b("); then");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    perl -MCPAN -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->load();' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("        -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->edit("urllist", "unshift", "");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/");' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("        -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->commit()'");t.b("
" + i);t.b("fi");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# Perl 5.36 及以上用户还需要关闭 pushy_https");t.b("
" + i);t.b("perl -MCPAN -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->load();' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->edit("pushy_https", 0);' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    -e 'CPAN::HandleConfig->commit()'");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
